description: Enhanced HTML table with sorting, filtering, pagination, row expansion, and selection

attributes.name: data-paginate
attributes.description: Enable pagination with N rows per page

structure.description: Standard HTML table — the component enhances it in place

childAttributes.name: data-sort
childAttributes.description: Enable sorting on this column with the specified comparator

childAttributes.name: data-sort-value
childAttributes.description: Custom sort value overriding cell text

childAttributes.name: data-filter-value
childAttributes.description: Custom filter value overriding cell text

childAttributes.name: data-expandable
childAttributes.description: Mark row as expandable (followed by a data-expand-content row)

childAttributes.name: data-expand-content
childAttributes.description: Hidden row revealed when its preceding expandable row is toggled

childAttributes.name: data-selectable
childAttributes.description: Mark row as selectable via checkbox

events.name: data-table:sort
events.description: Fired when a column is sorted

events.name: data-table:expand
events.description: Fired when a row is expanded or collapsed
